provenance.claim: The source boards are AI-generated and the runtime atlas is deterministically pixelified; neither is hand-pixeled or pixel-authored.

sourceSheet.backgroundRemoval: imagegen/remove_chroma_key.py with soft matte and despill

houseStyle.description: Original premium gothic 32-bit-era JRPG portraiture with elegant anime realism, ink-like contour control, baroque chiaroscuro, sculpted face planes, restrained highlights, and deliberate crisp pixel clusters.
constraints: one head-and-upper-torso bust per source cell
stable eye line, crop, costume, pose, lighting, and pixel density
only facial expression changes between columns
no franchise character, actor, celebrity, artist, or real-person likeness
no text, logos, watermarks, weapons, props, hands, or scenery

expressions.strain: fatigue, pain, or difficult admission without melodrama

characters.name: Ren Ishikawa
characters.identity: Japanese courier; square-tapered face, short forward black hair, rain-blue collar, cedar-brown coat and satchel strap

characters.name: Aya Shinohara
characters.identity: Japanese archivist; soft oval face, practical side locks, muted-teal layers and parchment-ivory archive garment

characters.name: Nikola Dražanić
characters.identity: Croatian-English frontier hunter; high forehead, backswept brown hair, moustache and clipped beard, dusk-blue cloak, oxblood doublet, falling band and chainmail edge

characters.name: Father Mateus Avelar
characters.identity: Portuguese priest living in Japan; narrow gaunt face, tired eyes, wavy black hair, restrained facial hair and charcoal Japanese travel robes

characters.name: Genta Mononobe
characters.identity: Japanese frontline protector; broad square face, cropped black hair, short jaw beard, earth-gray mantle and oxidized-gold clasp

characters.name: Kiku Nawa
characters.identity: Japanese field physician; round-tapered face, practical side tie, herb-green cloak and candle-ivory medicine collar

characters.name: Miyo Senda
characters.identity: Japanese weather reader; soft-angular face, center-parted looped working tie, storm-blue collar, pale underlayer and brass instrument accent
